EmailTemplate.name: Notify Sales Manager On Opportunity
EmailTemplate.subject: New Opportunity assigned: {!Opportunity.Name} on {!Opportunity.Todays_Date__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Opportunity.Sales_Manager_User__c},
The Opportunity- {!Opportunity.Name} has been assign to you.
Please Click Here to access the opportunity.
Regards, Salesforce Team
